_note: Canonical caption/transcript corrections for ZABAL Gamez recordings. YouTube auto-captions consistently mis-hear the ZAO brand vocabulary; this file is the reusable fix list so the intern stops re-listing the same ones every video. Used by scripts/fix-transcript.mjs. See docs/recordings-workflow.md. 'safe' rules are auto-applied (whole-word, case-insensitive by default). 'review' rules are context-dependent and ONLY flagged for a human - never auto-replaced - because the same misheard word maps to different fixes depending on meaning (e.g. Zaal the person vs ZAO the org; $Zabal the token vs Zabal the project).

safe.note: token reference in these talks; reviewer drops the $ if it's the project/brand
canonical brand spelling is WaveWarZ (capital Z) per llms.txt
the bare misheard 'Zal'; the longer 'Zaal' is left intact by the word boundary
mishearing of the host Zaal (Jose Cabrera session)
casing fix; word boundary keeps ZAODEVZ etc. intact

review.note: almost always the brand 'ZABAL Gamez' - but SKIP generic uses like 'video games'. Most frequent correction; confirm each.
ONLY when the speaker means the org/community, not the person Zaal. Context-dependent - do not blanket replace.
pure mishearing of a phrase; only where context fits.
event name - confirm which event was actually said.
confirm - 'SaaS' is also a real term.
host mishearing (Jose Cabrera session); Saul is also a real name - confirm it is the host.
host mishearing; very short with high false-positive risk - confirm each.
the ZAO music brand COC Concertz, heard as 'ZOC concerts'.
ecosystem mishearing ('Zabo ecosystem'); could be ZAO - confirm by context.
the artist's stage name (Jose Cabrera) - confirm; he sometimes says it singular.
